name: Pablo Picasso

acts.description: Systematic psychological cruelty to intimate partners; two partners attempted suicide
Relationships with much younger women, including Françoise Gilot at 17 when he was 61
Marie-Thérèse Walter relationship begun when she was 17 and he was 45

behavior_summary: The most celebrated artist of the 20th century was also a documented psychological abuser. He famously said women are either goddesses or doormats. He meant it.

art.summary: Co-invented Cubism. The most influential artist of the 20th century. His work is in every major museum on Earth.

verdict.blurb: He painted Guernica — one of the great indictments of violence against civilians — while treating the women in his life as disposable objects to drain and discard. Two killed themselves. He said women are either goddesses or doormats. He painted both.
